name: Kinsus Interconnect Technology Corp.
summary: Kinsus Interconnect Technology Corp. primarily researches, develops, designs, manufactures, and sells electronic products in Taiwan and internationally. The company operates in two segments, IC Substrate and Printed Circuit Board (PCB). It offers plastic ball grid array, multi-chip-module ball grid array (BGA), chip scale package (CSP) mini-BGA, high dissipation cavity down, thermal enhanced BGA, flip chip, flip chip CSP, flip chip film chip on flex, core-less, all layer build up, embedded pattern and passive, high density copper bump, high band width package-on-package, core-less embedded passive, and radio frequency module substrates. The company also provides system in package, a carrier substrate that provides a platform for multiple chips or packages or passive components assembly; and PCBs and related products, and electronic components, as well as after sales services. In addition, the company is involved in the wholesale and retail-sale of electronic materials; sale of medical equipment; provision of consultation services for business operation and management; and investment and trading activities. Its products are used for modules in handset and wearable devices, microprocessors, controllers, graphic and application processors, ASIC, PC chipsets, connectivity, power management, memory, power amplifier, front end and WiFi connectivity modules, and field programmable gate array applications. The company primarily serves IC packaging, design, and system businesses, as well as manufacturers of electronic products. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
